author: y4rr
content: [action] Phase 6 dispatch: Tier 1 parity sweep — 5 deliverables. ConvNeXt depthwise (#997), ResNet18/34/VGG11/16 value-parity tests, DeepLabV3 ASPP migration (#988), DenseNet121 BN (#989), FCN dilated backbone (#994). Probe-before-fix on ASPP migration mandatory. Bottleneck refactor must preserve ResNet50 PASS. STOP-AND-REPORT per deliverable on unexpected divergences.
